top_signals.title: AI wealth must benefit the public, South Korea's deputy PM says amid Samsung labor tensions
top_signals.summary: South Korea's deputy PM tells CNBC there are concerns as to whether AI could worsen wealth gaps or lead to job losses.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Frank Elderson: A central banker’s perspective on climate change and nature degradation
Starmer urges TNT Sports to air Champions League final for free
top_signals.summary: Sir Keir Starmer has urged the broadcaster of the Champions League final to air the game for free next Saturday.  The Prime Minister is attempting to prevent this year becoming the first in the Champion’s Leagues 34-year history in which the final is not free to watch for British fans.  The match will be streamed [...]
